owner_intent: Include YouTube Creative Commons and Google Images usage-rights results in the project's media research scope, while separating discovery candidates from assets verified for production use.

approved_discovery_channels.discovery_method: Use YouTube's Creative Commons search filter to find videos marked with the Creative Commons Attribution license.
candidate_uses: source leads for Shorts, Reels, CardNews, blog, and editorial graphics
required_candidate_checks: Confirm the video's displayed license and description on the current source page.
Record title, uploader, source URL, license, access date, and required attribution.
Check whether the uploader appears to control the included video, audio, images, and other components.
Check embedded music, broadcasts, films, photographs, people, brands, privacy, and other third-party elements separately.
Confirm that the intended modification, commercial context, platform, and attribution comply with the license.
Keep reuse permission separate from YouTube reused-content monetization eligibility.

approved_discovery_channels.discovery_method: Use Google Images Tools and Usage rights to find images with attached Creative Commons or commercial and other license information.
candidate_uses: photography, illustration, diagram, texture, and public-domain lead discovery
CardNews, blog, editorial graphic, thumbnail, and scene-reference candidate discovery
required_candidate_checks: Open License details instead of relying on the thumbnail or filter label.
Confirm the license with both the license provider and the host page.
Record creator, original host, source URL, license URL, access date, and attribution format.
Confirm commercial-use permission, modification permission, attribution, share-alike, and no-derivatives conditions where applicable.
Check whether the host or uploader has authority over the image and any recognizable person, artwork, logo, product, property, or embedded work.
Do not assume that free access or a Google result means unrestricted use.

verification_states.meaning: Found through a license-related search filter but source terms have not yet been checked.
The current license details and host page were opened and recorded.
Embedded media, people, brands, attribution, modification, and intended-use conditions were reviewed.
The asset has enough recorded evidence for owner review as a production candidate.
The owner approved the exact asset and intended use; this does not by itself mean it was published.
The exact licensed asset was used and its required attribution was preserved in the delivery record.

operating_rules: Use both channels to widen legitimate media discovery, especially when topic-connected official imagery is unavailable.
Prefer the original creator, institution, official brand, broadcaster, or primary host over mirrors and reposts.
Do not download every search result; collect only relevant candidates with recorded source and license metadata.
Do not call an asset copyright-free when it is licensed with conditions. Use the exact license name and conditions.
Discovery and research may proceed within the approved source-analysis task, but downloading for production, modification, external upload, or publication follows the applicable owner approval gate.
License terms and platform policies can change, so verify them at the time of intended use.
